## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on CVE database implementation progress, dependencies, and next steps between SentinelOne and GrowthX teams.](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Nicolas (GrowthX) needs GitHub access to start frontend work; John to initiate request](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Project timeline: aiming for go-live \~3rd week of October (post-SentinelOne's Oct 7 release)](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Designs near completion; Nicolas meeting George tomorrow to finalize filters and small changes](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [ContentStack setup: using JSON RTE field for custom components; Algolia integration planned](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)

## Topics

### ContentStack Implementation

  - [Nicolas explored ContentStack, planning custom types + JSON RTE for body content](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Custom components (e.g., timeline) to be embedded in JSON RTE field](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [SEO components likely part of ContentStack; pipeline needed to generate SEO tags/info](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

### Frontend Development

  - [Next.js codebase with Tailwind CSS for styling](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [No component libraries used; mix of existing and new custom components](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Nicolas needs repo access to leverage existing components/styles](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [John to set up directory for Nicolas to work in](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)

### Project Timeline and Dependencies

  - [SentinelOne releasing on October 7th](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [CVE database implementation targeted for \~2 weeks post-release](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Tentative go-live set for 3rd week of October (per Ankit's meeting with Aida/George)](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)

### Design Status

  - [Designs near completion with only small changes pending](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Nicolas meeting George tomorrow to discuss filters and finalize details](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Marisol provided mandatory filter requirements; review needed](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)

### Access and Onboarding

  - [John initiating GitHub access request for Nicolas today](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Additional team member access may take 1-2 weeks due to onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Decision to prioritize Nicolas' access, then address other team member](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)

### Integration Considerations

  - [Search functionality using Algolia](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [SEO components and sitemaps in development by SentinelOne team](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Need to avoid redundant components while allowing independent work](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

## Next Steps

  - [John to submit GitHub access request for Nicolas](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Nicolas to provide names of any additional team members needing access](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Nicolas to meet with George to finalize design details and filters](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [John to prepare overview of search, SEO, and sitemap components for integration](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Nicolas to review UI components once access granted, adjust for sitemaps/SEO data](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Teams to maintain communication on progress and dependencies](https://fathom.video/share/uhE5DPaRFPjPf4sF9x9PtzrTA6cCjDEB?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
